name: deconstruct-toolkit
description: Reverse-engineer polished artifacts (copy, document packs, UI, arguments, products, organizations) — surface design blueprints, hidden frameworks, rhetorical mechanisms, and intentional omissions. Cultural-variant lenses for EN / JA / ZH (rhetoric / persuasion / genre / frame). Grounded in Burke, Toulmin, Hinds, 劉勰《文心雕龍》, Goffman, Lakoff, Doi, Hu/Hwang, Cialdini, Brignull, Swales/Bhatia, Nielsen-Norman, 山口周『武器になる哲学』. 制作物・論証・製品の脱構築 (英日中文化バリアント対応)。作品・論證・產品的逆向解構工具組（英日中文化變體）。
